eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Gila, AZ; Arizona; Apache; Cochise; Graham; Greenlee; La Paz; Maricopa; Mohave; Navajo; Pima; Pinal; Santa Cruz; Yavapai; Yuma, AZ; at 10:21 PM ON MAR 6, 2026 Effective until 06:21 AM MAR 7, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety.  A SAFE Alert has been issued for Maricopa County. The Gilbert Police Department is looking for 65 year old William Larsen.  William is a white male, 6 feet 3 inches tall, 300 pounds, bald with hazel eyes and an unknown clothing description.  William was last seen at 11:00 PM on 3/5/26 driving a 2022 Ram 1500, with Arizona license plate TWINFAN.  He was last seen at Lindsay Road and Ray Road in Gilbert, Arizona. William has a medical condition which may cause him to become lost or easily confused.  If you have seen William, please contact the Gilbert Police Department at 480-503-6500 or call 911. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
